title: Unnatural
description:
New Server Out Now!

Unorthodox Palladium Addon with bosses and dungeons, and multiple other things, modpack is also built for lower-end PC's
body:
This Server will purely only feature one palladium addonpack:

Unorthodox (Originally called Project Singular)

It will also feature dungeons and bosses, that allow for more activities to do within the server. There will also be Artifacts that will allow for advantages. Additionally there'll be different events that happen within the server, being simple. and things being locked.

Powers will be something you can get one free roll for at the start of the server, to make it interesting, there'll also be rules for power...

For more info, Join the discord server https://discord.gg/ps3kUP7A
